# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: my-network
  type: compute.v1.network
  properties:
    autoCreateSubnetworks: true 

- name: my-subnetwork
  type: compute.v1.subnetwork
  properties:
    ipCidrRange: '10.0.0.0/9'
    network: '$(ref.my-network.selfLink)'
    region: 'us-central1'

- name: my-deployment
  type: deployment.v1.apps
  properties:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-app
    spec:
      replicas: 3
      selector:
        matchLabels:
          app: my-app
      template:
        metadata:
          labels:
            app: my-app
        spec:
          containers:
          - name: my-app
            image: gcr.io/PROJECT_ID/my-app
            ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
